DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with fifteen days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
